title: AI Helps People Be More Creative
summary: Scientists found that AI can help people be more creative, not just do work faster. In a study, over 800 people used an AI system to design virtual cars. The AI showed many different car ideas, including good ones, weird ones, and even bad ones. This made people spend more time designing, create better cars, and feel more excited. The researchers say AI should be seen as a creative partner that encourages exploration and new ideas. They think AI can help in fields like art and engineering by making humans more creative and collaborative.

being able to make new and original things, like art or designs
the process of planning how something will look or work

a partner who works with you on a task

background_read: AI is technology that can do tasks like thinking or learning. People often worry AI might take jobs, but this study shows it can also help humans be more creative by working together on projects like designing cars.
Article_Structure: WHAT: Found AI helps people be more creative by showing diverse design ideas
WHERE: In an online experiment with over 800 participants
WHY: To understand how AI can be a creative partner instead of just a tool for efficiency

perspectives.description: AI encourages people to explore new ideas and feel more involved in tasks
